pure_specials.text: Gears grind in flesh. The City's will is absolute.
Do not show that you remember this melody.

character_chains.name: Ishmael
texts: The compass is still spinning, pointing towards that name.
Is even this better than sailing without direction?
I'm sick of blind obedience, but... I can't stop yet.

character_chains.name: Faust
texts: The logic of this prescript falls within Faust's calculations.
